title.en: The years passed, and another period of time pa...

content.en:
The years passed, and another period of time passed.

At this time, the impact of the Reincarnation Purple Abyss Riot has gradually passed.

Ye Tian's Ao Chen's copy body was also cultivated honestly, so naturally it didn't attract much attention.

this day.

His duplicate body carried the resources collected from the Reincarnation Purple Abyss to the crack passage of the Innocent Abyss, and he walked around and around during this time, making sure that none of the Origin Upper Realm Overlords were following him.

In fact, with his current cultivation strength, even if the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords followed him, he would be able to detect a trace of it.

"It's here!"

Ye Tian entered the Innocent Abyss, handed over the resources to the True Body Copy Body, and then returned to the Reincarnation Dark Domain.

......

Tian Shan Pavilion.

Ye Tian brought these resources back, and he was in a good mood.

"So many resources, enough for me to quickly rise to the limit of the fifth balance!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He estimated that he could probably raise his cultivation to the limit of the fifth balance in the 100 million primeval era, which was already extremely terrifying.

After all, for the Eight Awakenings Origin Upper Realm Overlord, 100 million primeval epochs was not a very long time, it was just a retreat.

"Next, I will work hard to cultivate, raise my cultivation to the fifth balance limit, and then hit the sixth balance realm. "

The days that followed.

Ye Tian's replica body retreated and cultivated to improve his cultivation, while the other replica bodies went all out to create the supreme divine power of reincarnation.

Although his true body replica body created two reincarnation supreme supernatural powers, the Ruin Heaven Spear and the Reincarnation Flow Body Technique, only two reincarnation supreme supernatural powers were not enough.

Like the nine awakening of the reincarnation celestial clan, almost all of them have created several reincarnation supreme supernatural powers, although they are not awakened reincarnation supreme supernatural powers, but if there are many of them, they can still make up for the shortcomings in all aspects, so that they have very terrifying combat power.

Moreover, when it comes to the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, how terrifying is his own energy, the consumption of casting a reincarnation supreme divine power is very small, and he can fight for a long time.

Therefore, the more reincarnation supreme supernatural powers, the better.

Fortunately, Ye Tian has awakened two reincarnation supreme powers, and created two reincarnation supreme powers, and has a lot of insights, and it will not be too difficult to create the third reincarnation supreme powers.

If 100 million primeval years are not enough, then 200 million primeval years.

However, he felt that he should be able to create the third reincarnation supreme supernatural power in the time of 100 million primeval years.

The years that followed were peaceful, and nothing major happened.

In the land of eternity, at most, some forces fought with each other, resulting in local wars, but none of them could affect the Tianshan Pavilion and the human race.

After all, with Ye Tian in charge, who would dare to provoke them!

However, some Origin Upper Realm Overlords came to visit Ye Tian, but they were all rejected on the grounds that Ye Tian was in retreat.

10,000,000 primeval eras!

20 million primeval era!

50 million primeval era!

Time flies.

Before you know it, 100 million primeval years are about to pass.

this day.

After Ye Tian swallowed a treasure resource, his cultivation finally reached the limit of the fifth balance.

"Finally reached the limit of the fifth balance!"

Ye Tian was excited.

His strength has not improved much, but when he reaches the limit of the fifth balance, he is qualified to hit the sixth balance!

......

The ruins of reincarnation.

Ye Tian chose a quiet place and prepared to hit the sixth balance here.

The sixth balance was definitely not something that could be broken through once, and it would take him a long time to try, and the breakthrough process might cause destruction around him, so he didn't break through in the Tianshan Pavilion.

He first took out the previous three-source secret medicine, combined with some resources to assist in the breakthrough, and carried out the first impact.

Outcome.

"Failed!"

The bottleneck from the fifth balance to the sixth balance was too strong, and his breakthrough this time did not even shake the slightest.

"Those Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords in the Land of Eternity have not broken through for countless years, and even the Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan want to break the shackles, it is also extremely difficult, how can it be so easy for me to break it for the first time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

"It seems that we have to research the new three-source secret medicine, and we also have to refine the Reincarnation Realm Breaking Pill!"

He has a lot of mushroom vines, and if he collects other materials, he can refine the Reincarnation Realm Breaking Pill, although the Reincarnation Realm Breaking Pill only has the effect of impacting the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan.

But what he cultivates is the body of reincarnation Haotian, and he has a part of the physique of the reincarnation heavenly clan, and the reincarnation realm breaking pill should also be of some use to him.

In short, if you can help break through, then you have to give it a try.

"The copy body on my side will slowly study the three-source secret medicine first, and the Ao Chen copy body will collect other materials, and then try to refine the Reincarnation Realm Breaking Pill!"

Subsequently.

Ao Chen's copy body began to collect other materials needed for the Reincarnation Realm Breaking Pill in the Reincarnation Celestial Clan, but he was soon discovered by the Reincarnation Celestial Clan.

Because these materials are all resources that the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan prohibits from flowing out and trading, they are very rare, Ye Tian tried to collect them, and Yazu and them naturally knew about it.

Reincarnation of the ancient mountain.

Yazu contacted Ye Tian.

"Ao Chen, you want to refine the Reincarnation Breaking Realm Pill??? you are now too far away from the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, there is no need to rush to collect it. "

Yazu asked.

Ye Tian hurriedly said: "Lord Yazu, I was lucky to find a small piece of mushroom vine last time, so I want to gather other materials and try refining it." I don't need it now, but I might use it in the future!"

"Okay, it's good to try, in addition to the mushroom vine, other materials can be exchanged in the Reincarnation Ancient Mountain!" Yazu said.

It is also extremely rare that the mushroom vine is extremely rare, and other materials are not rare, but they are all monopolized by the high-level of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, so it is not easy to collect.

"Thank you, Lord Azu!"

Ye Tiandao.

Soon.

He exchanged a lot of resources from the Reincarnation Ancient Mountain, and gathered the materials for refining the Reincarnation Realm Breaking Pill.

Subsequently, he began to refine the Reincarnation Realm Breaking Pill.

The Reincarnation Realm Breaking Pill is not difficult to refine, it's just that the pill recipe and materials are difficult to obtain, but now they are all available.

Therefore, he quickly refined the Reincarnation Realm Breaking Pill.

......

"Six Reincarnation Realm Breaking Pills!"

This is the number of Reincarnation Realm Breaking Pills that Ye Tian has refined.

It's not that he doesn't want to continue refining, it's that other materials are running out.

"I can't continue to exchange materials, otherwise it will easily arouse the suspicion of the reincarnation celestial clan. Six Reincarnation Realm Breaking Pills should be almost enough! When you really need to break through, you can take the Reincarnation Realm Breaking Pill!"

Ye Tian muttered.
